_provenance: schema-derived from h4-telemetry-helper plan deliverable (1) + 021-cvar-diagnostics column spec; field values are representative named constants, not captured from a live run

_notes.cvar_5pct: null sentinel — mirrors MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL; sufficient-case tests supply a non-null value but must derive the magnitude from the fixture, not assert a hardcoded float
_notes.cvar_n_tail: integer count of DISTINCT sub-5% tail observations; zero here represents the insufficient sentinel case

return_value.note: live mode returns None on success or swallowed error
replay mode returns None on success
